# assets/vendor/

Local copies of third-party JavaScript and CSS libraries. Used when `useLocalAssets` is `true` in `config.json` (the default).

Set `useLocalAssets` to `false` in `config.json` to load from CDN instead.

## Contents

| Directory | Library | Version | License | License File |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ace/` | Ace Editor | 1.43.3 | BSD 3-Clause | `ace/LICENSE` |
| `sweetalert2/` | SweetAlert2 | 11.x | MIT | `sweetalert2/LICENSE` |
| `jquery/` | jQuery | 3.7.1 | MIT | `jquery/LICENSE` |
| `contextmenu/` | jQuery contextMenu | 2.9.2 | MIT | `contextmenu/LICENSE` |

## Distribution

Each subdirectory contains a `LICENSE` file from the upstream project. These files must be included when distributing CFMLFiddle to comply with the BSD and MIT license terms.
